tasks.title: Stabilize Flow/Mem/Kernel ASDL shape
tasks.detail: Curate the newly added LalinFlow/LalinMem/LalinKernel schemas so they encode the intended tower: LalinCode residual semantics; LalinFlow code-CFG facts with edge roles; LalinMem code-level memory/provenance facts and proofs; LalinKernel backend-neutral executable kernel sites, streams, cores, and schedules. Keep LalinKernel independent from LalinVec. Verify schema smoke tests.
notes: Completed initial schema curation: added Flow edge roles and bounds, Mem code contract proofs, KernelSite, KernelAssumption, target-neutral KernelLaneShape, explicit atomic/volatile/trap rejects. Schema smoke tests pass.

Design correction: KernelSite/residual LowerRegion was removed as overengineered rewrite/replacement semantics. The tower now models recognize-and-lower at whole-function/item boundaries. Loops remain facts inside KernelCore, not replacement sites.

tasks.title: Add schema constructor tests for Flow/Mem/Kernel
tasks.detail: Extend schema tests to instantiate representative LalinFlow, LalinMem, and LalinKernel nodes, including a counted loop, memory access fact, kernel stream, kernel site, and planned scalar/vector schedules. Reclaimed from stale disconnected claim agent-JTYV80 after coms-net peek target_not_connected.
tasks.evidence: Extended tests/test_schema_core.lua with constructor coverage for CodeContractFactSet plus representative LalinFlow counted loop/edge/range, LalinMem access/proof/fact set, and LalinKernel site/stream/scalar+vector plans/rejection. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua`.

tasks.title: Extract code-level contract facts
tasks.detail: Translate Tree.ContractFact values into LalinCode.CodeContractFactSet keyed by CodeFuncId/CodeValueId so LalinMem no longer depends on LalinTree contracts for proof provenance. Reclaimed from stale disconnected claim agent-058BCD after coms-net peek target_not_connected.
tasks.evidence: Updated lua/lalin/tree_to_code.lua to expose `contracts(module, opts)` and `module_with_contracts(module, opts)`, translating tree contract facts to LalinCode.CodeContractFactSet/CodeFuncContractFact keyed by CodeModuleId, CodeFuncId, and CodeValueId, with unsupported contract expressions emitted as CodeContractRejected. Added focused assertions in tests/test_tree_to_code.lua for bounds/disjoint/noalias/readonly lowering and verified with `luajit tests/test_tree_to_code.lua`.

tasks.title: Implement code_flow_facts phase
tasks.detail: Analyze CodeFunc blocks, terminators, block params, and jump arguments to produce LalinFlow.FlowFactSet with edges, loop roles, counted domains, inductions, exits, ranges, and rejection facts. Reclaimed from stale disconnected claim agent-DVP75D after coms-net peek target_not_connected.
tasks.evidence: Added lua/lalin/code_flow_facts.lua with deterministic LalinCode CFG edge extraction, natural-loop/backedge/exit roles, counted-domain/primary-induction recognition from block params and jump args, constant/range facts, and explicit FlowReject facts for non-counted/unsupported cases. Added tests/test_code_flow_facts.lua covering counted loop facts, edge roles, switch edge kinds, and const ranges. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_tree_to_code.lua && luajit tests/test_code_flow_facts.lua`.

tasks.title: Implement code_mem_facts phase
tasks.detail: Analyze CodeInstLoad/Store/Atomics, CodePlace and CodeInstPtrOffset/view-derived access patterns to produce LalinMem.MemFactSet. Preserve volatility/atomics/trap semantics and validate consistency against CodeMemoryAccess.
tasks.evidence: Added lua/lalin/code_mem_facts.lua to extract LalinMem.MemFactSet from LalinCode loads/stores/atomics, normalize CodePlace/CodeInstPtrOffset/view-derived addressing into base/index/pattern/bounds/alignment/trap facts, preserve access/volatile/atomic metadata through CodeMemoryAccess, conservatively emit alias/dependence unknown facts, and fail loudly on access-mode/type contradictions. Added tests/test_code_mem_facts.lua covering loop indexed load/store facts, induction-derived access patterns, alias/dependence facts, and atomic/volatile/nontrapping preservation. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_tree_to_code.lua && luajit tests/test_code_flow_facts.lua && luajit tests/test_code_mem_facts.lua`.

tasks.title: Implement code_kernel_plan phase
tasks.detail: Consume CodeModule, FlowFactSet, MemFactSet, and CodeContractFactSet to produce LalinKernel.KernelModulePlan with explicit rejections for unsupported loops/memory, scalar reductions/maps, pointer-stream schedules, and vector-eligible schedules.
tasks.evidence: Added lua/lalin/code_kernel_plan.lua to consume CodeModule + FlowFactSet + MemFactSet + CodeContractFactSet and emit LalinKernel.KernelModulePlan. It builds KernelSite/streams/stores/counters, emits KernelNoPlan with explicit loop/memory/trap/alias/dependence rejections for unsafe cases, uses code contracts as bounds/noalias assumptions/proofs, and emits vector-eligible schedules for contiguous contracted map loops. Added tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua covering a contracted planned map/vector schedule and an uncontracted pointer loop rejected without silent fallback. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_tree_to_code.lua && luajit tests/test_code_flow_facts.lua && luajit tests/test_code_mem_facts.lua && luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua`.

tasks.title: Review and narrow vector migration onto Kernel tower
tasks.detail: Do not rewrite the whole vector stack at once. Compare existing vec_loop_facts/vec_kernel_plan/vec_kernel_safety/vec_kernel_to_back against Flow/Mem/Kernel and decide how LalinVec becomes a consumer of Kernel/Lower rather than a competing fact tower. Make only design-coherent compatibility edits/tests.
tasks.evidence: Reviewed the existing vector stack against the corrected recognize-and-lower tower. Decided not to migrate tree-shaped Vec facts into the generic tower now; instead explicitly marked vec_loop_facts.lua, vec_kernel_plan.lua, vec_kernel_safety.lua, and vec_kernel_to_back.lua as legacy/prototype Back fast-path modules. Generic loop/memory/safety/schedule facts now belong in LalinFlow/LalinMem/LalinKernel, while LalinVec should shrink toward vector-specific lane/target lowering over Kernel schedules. Verified current vector behavior remains intact with `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua && luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`.
notes: Unblocked/re-scoped from broad full migration. The previous block was a scope/design concern, not a technical impossibility.
Released stale claim from aborted worker session; this is a design task, not a blind worker implementation task.

tasks.title: Add kernel validators
tasks.detail: Validate Flow/Mem/Kernel facts for referential integrity, deterministic ordering, no contradictions with CodeMemoryAccess, coverage of KernelSite blocks, and explicit handling of atomic/volatile/trapping accesses.
tasks.evidence: Added lua/lalin/kernel_validate.lua with validation for Flow/Mem/Kernel module coherence, referential integrity against CodeModule funcs/blocks/insts/values, duplicate IDs, MemAccessFact consistency with original CodeMemoryAccess/place/kind, KernelSite loop coverage, explicit KernelNoPlan rejections, and unsafe planned volatile/atomic/may-trap handling. Added tests/test_kernel_validate.lua covering a valid planned tower plus deliberate memory contradiction and empty KernelNoPlan rejection failures. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_tree_to_code.lua && luajit tests/test_code_flow_facts.lua && luajit tests/test_code_mem_facts.lua && luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Implement whole-function Lower selection phase
tasks.detail: Implement a simple lowering-selection phase around LalinLower.LowerModule: each CodeFunc lowers either as LowerFuncKernel when KernelModulePlan contains a KernelPlanned for the function, or as LowerFuncCode when kernel lowering rejects/is absent. No residual CFG splicing, no partial replacement, no live-in/out protocols. This is recognize-and-lower, not rewrite-and-replace.
tasks.evidence: Corrected design from rewrite/replacement to proper whole-function recognize-and-lower. Simplified lua/lalin/schema/kernel.asdl to KernelPlan over CodeFuncId (no KernelSite) and lua/lalin/schema/lower.asdl to whole-function LowerFuncCode/LowerFuncKernel selection (no residual CFG splicing). Updated code_kernel_plan.lua and kernel_validate.lua to new KernelFuncPlan shape. Added lua/lalin/code_lower_plan.lua and tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua. Verified with `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua && luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`.
notes: Unblocked/re-scoped from full C/Back projection. Start with a safe seam and explicit unsupported projection handling rather than a placeholder fast path.
Reframed after design correction: the missing ASDL layer is composition/residual lowering, not an eager projector seam. Added lua/lalin/schema/lower.asdl and loaded it in schema/init.lua.
Corrected design: removed residual/replacement architecture. LalinLower is now a whole-function lowering selector only. KernelPlan is per CodeFunc, not per KernelSite.

Refinement after completion: KernelPlan now has KernelSubjectFunc/KernelSubjectLoop. CodeLowerPlan only emits LowerFuncKernel for KernelSubjectFunc; current code_kernel_plan loop analyses remain LowerFuncCode until complete whole-function kernel semantics are recognized.

tasks.title: Integrate fact tower and whole-function Lower selection in frontend pipeline
tasks.detail: Update frontend_pipeline to run code_validate -> code_flow_facts -> code_mem_facts -> code_kernel_plan -> kernel_validate -> lower selection. Expose fact/plan/lower artifacts in pipeline results. Actual backend projection remains code path until lower_to_* exists.
tasks.evidence: Integrated the fact/lower tower into lua/lalin/frontend_pipeline.lua without changing backend projection yet: both native and C paths now use TreeToCode.module_with_contracts, then CodeValidate -> CodeFlowFacts -> CodeMemFacts -> CodeKernelPlan -> KernelValidate -> CodeLowerPlan. Pipeline result exposes code_contracts, flow_facts, mem_facts, kernel_plan, kernel_report, and lower_plan. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, `luajit tests/test_parse_typecheck.lua`, `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_to_c_smoke.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua` (attempted tests/test_mlua_host_pipeline.lua but file does not exist).
notes: Adjusted integration scope: pipeline can expose validated facts/plans before full replacement projection is mature.
Integration must include the new LalinLower composition boundary.
Integration must reflect recognize-and-lower: no residual replacement semantics.

tasks.title: Recognize complete whole-function kernel lowers
tasks.detail: Extend code_kernel_plan beyond loop-subject analysis facts so it can produce KernelSubjectFunc plans only when the entire CodeFunc semantics are represented by KernelCore plus function result/return semantics. Do not mark loop facts as whole-function lowers.
tasks.evidence: Implemented conservative whole-function reduction recognition in lua/lalin/code_kernel_plan.lua. Planner now emits KernelSubjectFunc only for complete counted reductions with no stores, identity init, accumulator backedge recurrence, and verified return of final accumulator from loop exit. Loop/store kernels remain KernelSubjectLoop facts. Added tests in tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua and tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua confirming copy_sum remains loop-subject/Code fallback while sum_loop becomes KernelSubjectFunc/LowerFuncKernel. Verified with `luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua && luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua`.
notes: Design correction discovered after T010: existing KernelCoreMap/Loop facts describe loop structure but do not yet encode whole function return semantics (e.g. copy_sum store+acc return). Lower selection now correctly refuses loop-subject plans.

tasks.title: Project whole-function Kernel lowers to C and Back
tasks.detail: Implement lower_to_c/lower_to_back for LowerFuncKernel whole-function lowers and LowerFuncCode fallback. Only project KernelSubjectFunc plans that encode complete function semantics; do not project loop-subject analysis facts as replacements.
tasks.evidence: Added lua/lalin/lower_to_back.lua and lua/lalin/lower_to_c.lua. Both consume LalinLower.LowerModule, preserve LowerFuncCode fallback through code_to_back/code_to_c, and project only KernelSubjectFunc + KernelCoreReduce whole-function kernels. Back projection emits a complete Back function body; C projection replaces the CBackendFunc and adds helper uses. Integrated frontend_pipeline to call LowerToBack/LowerToC after CodeLowerPlan while preserving legacy vector Back replacements for non-whole-function vector paths. Added projection validation assertions to tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua. Verified with `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua && luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua && luajit tests/test_code_to_c_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_code_to_back.lua`, plus an ad-hoc contracted ptr_sum whole-function kernel validating through both BackValidate and CValidate.
notes: Re-gated after semantic correction: projection requires complete whole-function KernelSubjectFunc plans, not loop-subject facts.

Follow-up speed/correctness improvement: lower_to_back/lower_to_c now recognize scalar i32 iota-sum reductions (no streams, add identity 0, start=0, step=1, contribution is counter) and lower them to a guarded closed-form n*(n-1)/2 with n>0 check, preserving n<=0 loop semantics. Verified runtime for cranelift and c/libtcc on n=-3,0,1,10 and benchmarked quick.

User correction accepted: closed-form iota micro-optimization was the wrong direction and has been removed from C/Back projection. Follow-up implemented proper architectural step instead: lower_to_back now consumes KernelScheduleVector for KernelSubjectFunc + KernelCoreReduce with memory streams, emitting Back vector load/binary/horizontal-reduce plus scalar tail. This is schedule-driven Kernel lowering, not one-off algebraic benchmaxxing. Added test coverage asserting ptr_sum KernelScheduleVector projects to Back vector commands. Current benchmark does not show ptr_sum speed gain yet, but the projection boundary is now correct for future target/schedule improvements.

tasks.title: Generalize whole-function kernel recognition beyond reductions
tasks.detail: Recognize complete whole-function KernelSubjectFunc plans for side-effecting counted map loops whose semantics are fully represented by KernelCoreMap plus a simple function return (void or constant/scalar return). This is a general semantic lowering boundary, not a benchmark special case.
tasks.evidence: Generalized code_kernel_plan around unified KernelBodyCounted semantics. Store+fold loops like copy_sum now become KernelSubjectFunc with streams plus KernelEffectStore and KernelEffectFold, and KernelResultFold. Store-only/simple-return kernels can be represented with KernelEffectStore plus KernelResultExpr/Void through simple loop-exit result analysis. Store expressions now lower through kernel_expr_for so load-derived store values are semantic KernelExprs instead of opaque value ids. Verified with `luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua && luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua && luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua && luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`.
notes: ASDL design step completed before implementation: LalinKernel now has unified semantic KernelBodyCounted with streams, bindings, effects, result, and safety. Map/reduce/loop are no longer primary KernelCore variants; stores and folds are KernelEffect variants, and function result is explicit KernelResult. Existing planner/lowerers were adapted to construct/consume this unified body for current coverage.

tasks.title: Project KernelCoreMap vector schedules to Back
tasks.detail: Extend lower_to_back to consume KernelScheduleVector for KernelCoreMap: vectorize contiguous load/store streams, lower KernelExpr trees generically, emit scalar tail, and validate Back. Avoid special-casing triad_store names or source shapes.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/lalin/lower_to_back.lua` so whole-function `KernelBodyCounted` projections are not fold-only: vector scheduled bodies now emit generic `KernelEffectStore` stores in the vector loop and scalar tail, while optionally also emitting `KernelEffectFold` reduction accumulation and `KernelResultFold` returns. Store values are lowered through KernelExpr trees, so copy_sum-style store+fold kernels validate as Back with CmdStoreInfo plus vector commands. Added test coverage in `tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_core.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`.
notes: Do not proceed by adding individual loop recognizers. Next Back work should lower KernelBodyCounted generically from bindings/effects/result/schedule.

tasks.title: Keep C path code-projection fallback until generic C kernel lowering exists
tasks.detail: Do not add point C optimizations. Keep lower_to_c projecting only generic safe lowers or falling back to code_to_c. Add notes/tests documenting that C kernel projection should follow the same KernelCoreMap/Reduce architecture later.
tasks.evidence: Kept `lua/lalin/lower_to_c.lua` conservative: C kernel projection now only replaces pure fold whole-function kernels whose `KernelBodyCounted` has no stores and whose result is the matching `KernelResultFold`; unsupported KernelBody shapes (including store+fold) fall back to ordinary `CodeToC.module` instead of erroring or partially optimizing. Added an explicit comment documenting the fallback policy and test coverage in `tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua` for store+fold fallback. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, and `luajit benchmarks/bench_c_vs_cranelift.lua quick`.
notes: C should follow the same KernelBody semantics; avoid per-benchmark formulas or C-only special cases.

tasks.title: Remove replacement_funcs bridge from kernel Back lowering
tasks.detail: Refactor lower_to_back/code_to_back integration so kernel lowering is a first-class module projection path, not an ad-hoc replacement_funcs override. The result should make LowerModule drive function projection directly while preserving CodeToBack fallback for LowerFuncCode.
tasks.evidence: Removed kernel lowering's `replacement_funcs` bridge. `lua/lalin/lower_to_back.lua` now detects `LowerFuncKernel` and drives first-class module projection: emits module prelude, declares all funcs, then emits either `kernel_body_commands` or `CodeToBack.function_body_commands`, and finalizes directly. Kernel body commands no longer emit their own `CmdDeclareFunc`. `lua/lalin/code_to_back.lua` now exposes `module_prelude_commands`, `function_declare`, and `function_body_commands` so LowerModule can drive projection without ad-hoc replacements. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_to_back.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`.
notes: Added because the prior 15-task scope completed transitional implementation but did not finish architectural cleanup.

tasks.title: Retire legacy tree-vector replacement path from frontend
tasks.detail: Remove or gate the legacy VecKernelPlan/VecKernelToBack replacement path in frontend_pipeline. Vector/kernel fast paths should come from LalinCode -> Flow/Mem/Kernel/Lower, not tree-shaped recognizers. Preserve legacy modules only as tests/prototype if needed, not as the active backend path.
tasks.evidence: Removed the active legacy tree-shaped vector replacement path from `lua/lalin/frontend_pipeline.lua`: no more `vec_kernel_plan`/`vec_kernel_to_back` requires, no `vector_back_replacements`, and `LowerToBack.module` is invoked only with the LalinCode/Flow/Mem/Kernel/Lower plan. Updated `tests/test_parse_kernels.lua` so the integrated kernel corpus checks lowering/JIT semantics instead of requiring the retired legacy vector replacement artifacts. Verified `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`.
notes: Added to address the active legacy LalinVec tree replacement path remaining in frontend_pipeline.

tasks.title: Generalize KernelExpr Back projection coverage
tasks.detail: Expand lower_to_back KernelExpr projection beyond the currently supported subset. Cover select/compare where schema supports them, value bindings, constants, loads, binary ops, and explicit failure for unsupported expressions. Add validation-focused tests for generic store/map/fold bodies.
tasks.evidence: Generalized KernelExpr Back projection in `lua/lalin/lower_to_back.lua`: scalar and vector paths now handle KernelExprValue, KernelExprConst, KernelExprLoad, KernelExprBinary, KernelExprCompare, and KernelExprSelect with explicit errors for unsupported expressions. Added cmp/vec-cmp mapping and fixed result expression return emission. Also fixed `code_kernel_plan.lua` KernelExpr DAG expansion so repeated values in sibling branches (e.g. select condition and else value) are re-expanded safely instead of becoming missing opaque values. Added compare/select vector projection coverage to `tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`.
notes: Added to move lower_to_back from narrow schedule/body handling toward a real KernelBody projector.

tasks.title: Make C kernel path purely fallback or fully generic
tasks.detail: Decide and enforce one clean C policy: either remove the remaining pure-fold custom projection and always fall back to CodeToC until generic C KernelBody lowering exists, or implement a generic KernelBody C projector mirroring Back semantics. Avoid partial point optimizations.
tasks.evidence: Enforced a clean C policy by rewriting `lua/lalin/lower_to_c.lua` to be a pure `CodeToC` projection wrapper. It accepts the `LowerModule` argument for pipeline symmetry but performs no partial KernelBody lowering and no point optimizations; generic C KernelBody lowering is deferred until it can consume the full semantics. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, and `luajit benchmarks/bench_c_vs_cranelift.lua quick`.
notes: Added because the current C pure-fold custom projection is transitional and should either become generic or be removed.

tasks.title: Document kernel tower architecture and remaining invariants
tasks.detail: Write a concise architecture note explaining LalinCode -> Flow/Mem/Kernel/Lower, KernelBodyCounted semantics, function-vs-loop subject rules, schedule-vs-semantics separation, Back/C projection policy, and legacy vector retirement status.
tasks.evidence: Added C_BACKEND_DESIGN.md section 31 documenting the kernel tower: LalinCode -> Flow/Mem/Kernel/Lower pipeline, KernelBodyCounted semantics, KernelSubjectLoop vs KernelSubjectFunc rule, schedule-vs-semantics separation, Back projection policy, pure CodeToC C fallback policy, and legacy LalinVec retirement status. Verified key tests: `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_kernel_plan.lua`, `luajit tests/test_kernel_validate.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, `luajit tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_code_to_back.lua`.
notes: Added to keep the expanded scope explicit and avoid confusing task completion with architectural completion.

tasks.title: Remove replacement_funcs API from CodeToBack
tasks.detail: Now that LowerToBack is the first-class LowerModule projector, remove the leftover opts.replacement_funcs path from code_to_back.lua. CodeToBack.module should always lower CodeModule directly; kernel substitution belongs only in LowerToBack.
tasks.evidence: Removed `opts.replacement_funcs` from `lua/lalin/code_to_back.lua`; CodeToBack.module now always projects CodeModule directly and no longer accepts replacement body injection. Grep confirms no `replacement_funcs` references remain under `lua/lalin` or `tests`. Verified `luajit tests/test_code_to_back.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`.
notes: Added after user clarified that plan completion must mean architecture completion, not transitional scope completion.

tasks.title: Hard-yank legacy tree/vector lowering modules
tasks.detail: Delete the old direct TreeToBack lowerer and legacy LalinVec tree-vector recognizer/lowerer modules. Remove production requires (including vec error explainer dependency) so stale modules cannot be loaded accidentally.
tasks.evidence: Hard-yanked legacy production modules: `lua/lalin/tree_to_back.lua`, `vec_kernel_plan.lua`, `vec_kernel_safety.lua`, `vec_kernel_to_back.lua`, `vec_loop_facts.lua`, and `vec_loop_decide.lua`. Removed the error catalog's `vec_loop_facts` explainer dependency and updated the remaining production comment in `lua/lalin/c/lower_c.lua`. Grep over `lua/lalin/**/*.lua` now has no references to the removed module names. Verified `luajit tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, `luajit tests/test_code_to_back.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`.
notes: Grep still shows tree_to_back and vec_kernel modules in tests and the legacy module itself; this must be inventoried rather than ignored.
User explicitly rejected keeping old code around; this task changed from inventory/quarantine to deletion.

Extended the hard-yank beyond the initial tree/vector recognizer modules: removed `schema/vec.asdl`, `vec_to_back.lua`, `vec_inspect.lua`, and removed LalinVec references from schema/editor/mlua/back diagnostics.

tasks.title: Port benchmarks and demos off tree_to_back/vec legacy modules
tasks.detail: Update benchmarks and playground diagnostics to use frontend_pipeline / LalinCode / LowerToBack or remove legacy vector diagnostics. No benchmark should require tree_to_back, vec_loop_facts, vec_kernel_plan, or vec_kernel_to_back.
tasks.evidence: Ported benchmarks off retired modules. `benchmarks/profile_compile.lua` now uses `frontend_pipeline.parse_and_lower`; `benchmarks/bench_diagnostics.lua` reports schedules from `result.kernel_plan`; `benchmarks/bench_c_frontend_vs_gcc.lua` now benchmarks equivalent Lalin source through the LalinCode native path instead of the retired direct tree lowerer; removed broken `benchmarks/bench_luajit_vs_cranelift.lua` that required nonexistent `back_luajit`. Grep over `benchmarks/*.lua` has no tree_to_back/vec_kernel/vec_loop/back_luajit references. Verified `luajit benchmarks/bench_diagnostics.lua`, `luajit benchmarks/profile_compile.lua`, and `luajit benchmarks/bench_c_frontend_vs_gcc.lua quick`.

tasks.title: Delete or port legacy tree/vector tests
tasks.detail: Remove tests whose only purpose was old tree_to_back or legacy LalinVec prototype coverage; port any still-important behavior coverage to LalinCode/CodeToBack/LowerToBack tests. No test should require removed modules.
tasks.evidence: Deleted tests whose only purpose was the removed direct TreeToBack or legacy tree-vector LalinVec modules. Ported remaining useful tests: `tests/test_tree_typecheck.lua` now compiles through `frontend_pipeline`, `tests/test_parse_playground.lua` no longer invokes vec_loop facts/decide, `tests/test_phase_builder.lua` uses `code.to_back`, and stale tree_to_back package-loaded/output assertions were removed from CodeToBack/schema/MOM tests. Grep over `tests/*.lua` has no references to tree_to_back, vec_loop_facts, vec_loop_decide, vec_kernel_plan, vec_kernel_safety, or vec_kernel_to_back. Verified `luajit tests/test_tree_typecheck.lua`, `tests/test_parse_playground.lua`, `tests/test_phase_builder.lua`, `tests/test_code_to_back.lua`, `tests/test_schema_compile_pipeline.lua`, `tests/test_code_lower_plan.lua`, and `tests/test_parse_kernels.lua`.
notes: Do not preserve old tests under legacy names unless they are ported to the current LalinCode path.

Also deleted/updated tests for the removed LalinVec schema and vector helper modules (`test_vec_to_back.lua`, `test_vec_inspect.lua`, plus BackTarget/ASDL/diagnostics tests now use Back-only target facts).

tasks.title: Add hard-yank regression gate
tasks.detail: Add a regression test that asserts removed legacy files do not exist and active Lua/benchmark/test code contains no requires of tree_to_back, vec_loop_facts, vec_loop_decide, vec_kernel_plan, vec_kernel_safety, or vec_kernel_to_back. Keep museum and historical markdown out of the active gate.
tasks.skipReason: User explicitly rejected a regression-test gate for hard-yank cleanup; we will verify by inspecting/grepping the codebase during the refactor instead of adding a gate test.
notes: Completion should be guarded mechanically so we do not regress into active retired paths.

tasks.title: Document hard-yank completion boundary
tasks.detail: Update architecture docs to say the legacy direct TreeToBack and tree-shaped LalinVec implementations were deleted, not quarantined. Define completion as no active code or tests loading the removed modules; verification is by direct codebase inspection/grep, not a dedicated gate test.
tasks.evidence: Updated `C_BACKEND_DESIGN.md` section 31.6/32 to say the legacy direct TreeToBack and LalinVec stack were deleted, not quarantined, and to define completion by direct codebase inspection. Also updated README and LANGUAGE_REFERENCE active file lists/tests to point at LalinCode/Kernel lowering rather than removed vector/tree modules. Inspection grep over `lua/lalin`, `tests`, `benchmarks`, README, LANGUAGE_REFERENCE, and C_BACKEND_DESIGN shows only C_BACKEND_DESIGN historical deletion notes mention the retired names; active Lua/ASDL code has none.
